loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing monthly active and reactive energy totals — subsidy limits, targets, and SEC are not configured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power trends over the last 7 days; rated and contracted power reference lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active energy import as input; output energy is not directly measured (export register data=N), so output and efficiency are estimated from import data.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load trend and load factor — anomaly events, expected load, and threshold data are not measured for this asset.
